overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running and walking through a futuristic urban environment beneath elevated highways. The scene transitions from a covered industrial walkway to sunlit sidewalks, crossing a street intersection, and approaching a busy transit area with the DRAKON building visible. Strong morning sunlight creates dramatic shadows and warm tones throughout the concrete and glass architecture.

events.description: character exits shadow of building into direct morning sunlight
emerges from covered walkway onto open sidewalk beneath elevated highway

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the covered walkway and emerging into the sunlit area beneath the elevated highway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance under the highway structure

entered.detail: large concrete wall of industrial building casting deep shadows
tall industrial tower with smoke stack emitting white smoke
massive concrete highway overpass spanning the entire scene overhead
metal chain link fence running along the left side of the walkway
tall dark building with large vertical white DRAKON signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shadowed covered walkway next to an industrial building. The character runs forward, emerging at 3 seconds into bright morning sunlight. By 8 seconds, the scene opens onto a wide sidewalk beneath massive elevated highways, with the DRAKON building becoming visible on the left. Sparse pedestrians are seen walking ahead in the distance.

events.description: vehicles pass by on the road to the right of the walkway

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the sidewalk under the highway overpass, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in same direction ahead of the character

entered.detail: metal and concrete barrier separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the wide pedestrian walkway beneath the elevated highway structure. The DRAKON building remains prominent on the left with its vertical signage. Several pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and sparse vehicle traffic moves along the road to the right, separated by a metal barrier railing.

events.description: character steps onto red paved crosswalk to cross the street
character completes crossing and turns back onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in white jacket crossing paths with the character at close range

entered.detail: open intersection with red paved crosswalk and traffic markings
traffic signal pole with green light visible

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses a street intersection, moving from the sheltered sidewalk into open sunlight. The crosswalk features distinctive red paving. A pedestrian in a white jacket passes closely by as the character crosses. Traffic lights and street signs become visible, and the DRAKON building disappears from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian corridor approaching transit hub

events.description: approaching complex multi-level interchange with overhead walkways

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway under the highway toward a busy transit area with increasing pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near the transit shelter ahead

entered.detail: pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead with glass panels
covered bus or train stop shelter with seating and signage
tall modern glass and steel skyscrapers in the background

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues under the elevated highway structure toward a more complex urban interchange. The character approaches a transit shelter where pedestrians are gathering. Overhead walkways and modern commercial skyscrapers dominate the background. The traffic barrier railing recedes to the distance as the walkway opens up, and vehicle traffic remains moderate on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed industrial corridor into a sprawling, sun-drenched urban interchange. It begins in a covered walkway beside an industrial building before emerging into bright morning sunlight beneath massive elevated highways, where the DRAKON building and its vertical signage become visible to the left. As the character continues along the wide pedestrian path, the scene shifts toward a street intersection, moving across distinctive red paving and passing a pedestrian in a white jacket while the DRAKON building recedes from view. The camera then pushes forward under the highway structure toward a complex transit area, where the environment opens up to reveal gathering crowds at a shelter and towering commercial skyscrapers in the background.
